title: Restricted Portals
description: Require an item to unlock other dimensions
body:
**What this Mod Does:**

A mod that requires the obtainment of an item before allowing the player to enter other dimensions.

 

**Reason:**

This mainly is to stop people on Multiplayer servers bypassing early game, but can be used for other reasons.

 

**Current Configuration Options:**
- Crafted Items (list of items that must be crafted before entering the dimension)
- Dimension Resource Names (for example "minecraft:the_nether")
- Dimension Display Names
- Advancement Title (%dim% for the dimension as per the example)
- Advancement Description (%item% for the required item and %dim% for the dimension as per the example)
- Blocked Message (%item% for the required item and %dim% for the dimension as per the example)
